name: the-power-of-positive-thinking
description: Norman Vincent Peale's The Power of Positive Thinking — a classic self-help and faith-based psychology toolkit teaching the transformative power of belief, prayer, affirmations, and visualization to overcome worry, fear, insecurity, and defeat, and achieve success and peace of mind.
useCase: Learn the power of positive thinking — build self-confidence, break the worry habit, create happiness, and handle defeat through faith-based psychological techniques.
knownRisks: The book has been criticized for oversimplifying complex psychological issues
The faith-based approach may not resonate with secular readers
Some critics argue positive thinking can become toxic positivity — denying legitimate problems
